Package com.sportradar.unifiedodds.sdk.internal.caching.impl

Class DataRouterImpl

java.lang.Object
com.sportradar.unifiedodds.sdk.internal.caching.impl.DataRouterImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
DataRouter
public class DataRouterImpl extends Object implements DataRouter
Implements methods used to trigger API fetches
